name: 3"x9" Natural Kitchen Drawer Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your kitchen drawers organized with the Bamboo Kitchen Drawer Organizer from Brightroom™. This kitchen drawer organizer is designed in a rectangular shape with an open top for easy organization. Made of bamboo, it makes a practical addition to your home and blends seamlessly with the rest of your decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
